incident_summary: Viable particle count in Grade B area exceeded action limit — 4 CFU/m³ at sample point 6 during start of batch A1977B campaign.
root_cause_detail: Drain in Grade B area identified as microbial reservoir — drain cover cracked allowing backflow during cleaning. Drain had not been inspected for {days()} days.
corrective_action: Drain cover replaced and drain sanitised with sporicidal agent. Enhanced cleaning protocol implemented. Area re-tested — all results within specification before restart.
preventive_action: Drain inspection added to weekly environmental walkthrough checklist. Trend analysis for Grade B EM results implemented — 2 consecutive alerts trigger immediate drain inspection.
effectiveness_check: Zero Grade B EM action limit exceedances for 12 months. Weekly drain inspection compliance 100%.
